options.explanation: Precarious is an adjective that means likely to fall or collapse. It means not secure or stable and hence is the most suitable option. Preemptive means acting in advance to prevent a crisis or to take advantage. Pristine refers to something that is in its original, untouched or unspoiled state. Precious means valuable or worthy.
